extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked with 6km remaining on Col de Turini, absorbed the break, and sprinted past rivals in final 200m to seal overall victory.
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam's 7km attack forced MARTÍNEZ to mark, allowing ROGLIČ to counterattack when accelerations had neutralized each other.
DENNIS pulled for ROGLIČ deep into final climb despite breakaway still ahead, revealing Jumbo's confidence in race leader's finishing kick.
QUINTANA repeatedly distanced then rejoining exploited tactical stalemate between ROGLIČ and MARTÍNEZ before final 300m sprint.
JORGENSON lost white jersey defending breakaway too long; aggressive riding in break costs young riders on summit finishes.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: sprint finish after 6km solo effort suggests diesel climbers with kick dominate gradual summit finishes like Turini
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: marking YATES Adam immediately then following ROGLIČ's attack shows UAE's confidence placing him over ALMEIDA on 7% gradients
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: chased ROGLIČ without brother then outsprinted QUINTANA for third; stronger than twin on sustained climbing
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: initiated attacks 7km out but caught before counterattacks launched; early aggression burned matches without tactical cover
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: poor early week but recovered to fifth; late arrival suggests he misjudged timing on 15km climbs
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: repeatedly gapped then returning indicates yo-yo climbing still competitive but lacks explosive response to accelerations
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: negative: lost white jersey defending breakaway; teams waste domestiques by leaving them in doomed breaks on queen stages
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: paced through final 10km with break still ahead shows team confidence in leader's sprint trumping time gaps
rider_signals.MÜHLBERGER Gregor: neutral: last survivor from break at 6km suggests solo climbers gain 60-90 seconds on organized chase before summit finishes
